verses.latin_vulgate: Salvum me fac, Deus,  quoniam intraverunt aquæ usque ad animam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹשִׁיעֵ֥נִי אֱלֹהִ֑ים כִּ֤י בָ֖אוּ מַ֣יִם עַד־נָֽפֶשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Save me, O God: for the waters are come in even unto my soul.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi kukkasista, edelläveisaajalle. (H69:2) Jumala,auta minua; sillä vedet käyvät hamaan minun sieluuni asti.
verses.king_james: Save me, O God; for the waters are come in unto my soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Infixus sum in limo profundi et non est substantia.  Veni in altitudinem maris, et tempestas demersit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: טָבַ֤עְתִּי ׀ בִּיוֵ֣ן מְ֭צוּלָה וְאֵ֣ין מׇעֳמָ֑ד בָּ֥אתִי בְמַעֲמַקֵּי־מַ֝֗יִם וְשִׁבֹּ֥לֶת שְׁטָפָֽתְנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I stick fast in the mire of the deep and there is no sure standing. I am come into the depth of the sea, and a tempest hath overwhelmed me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä vajoon syvään mutaan, jossa ei pohjaa ole: minä olen tullut syviin vesiin, ja virta upottaa minun.
verses.king_james: I sink in deep mire, where there is no standing: I am come into deep waters, where the floods overflow me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laboravi clamans, raucæ factæ sunt fauces meæ ;  defecerunt oculi mei, dum spero in Deum meum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָגַ֣עְתִּי בְקׇרְאִי֮ נִחַ֢ר גְּר֫וֹנִ֥י כָּל֥וּ עֵינַ֑י מְ֝יַחֵ֗ל לֵאלֹהָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have laboured with crying; my jaws are become hoarse, my eyes have failed, whilst I hope in my God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä väsyn huutamisesta: minun kurkkuni kuivettuu: minun näkyni vaipuu, toivoissani minun Jumalani päälle.
verses.king_james: I am weary of my crying: my throat is dried: mine eyes fail while I wait for my God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Multiplicati sunt super capillos capitis mei  qui oderunt me gratis.  Confortati sunt qui persecuti sunt me  inimici mei injuste ;  quæ non rapui, tunc exsolvebam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַבּ֤וּ ׀ מִשַּׂעֲר֣וֹת רֹאשִׁי֮ שֹׂנְאַ֢י חִ֫נָּ֥ם עָצְמ֣וּ מַ֭צְמִיתַי אֹיְבַ֣י שֶׁ֑קֶר אֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹֽא־גָ֝זַ֗לְתִּי אָ֣ז אָשִֽׁיב׃
verses.douay_rheims: They are multiplied above the hairs of my head, who hate me without cause. My enemies are grown strong who have wrongfully persecuted me: then did I pay that which I took not away.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niitä on enempi kuin päässäni hiuksia, jotka ilman syytä minua vihaavat, jotka syyttömästi minun viholliseni ovat, ja minua hukuttavat, ovat väkevät: niitä täytyy minun maksaa, joita en minä ryövännyt.
verses.king_james: They that hate me without a cause are more than the hairs of mine head: they that would destroy me, being mine enemies wrongfully, are mighty: then I restored that which I took not away.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deus, tu scis insipientiam meam ;  et delicta mea a te non sunt abscondita.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱֽלֹהִ֗ים אַתָּ֣ה יָ֭דַעְתָּ לְאִוַּלְתִּ֑י וְ֝אַשְׁמוֹתַ֗י מִמְּךָ֥ לֹֽא־נִכְחָֽדוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: O God, thou knowest my foolishness; and my offences are not hidden from thee:
verses.finnish_biblia: Jumala, sinäpä tiedät minun tyhmyyteni, ja minun rikokseni ei ole sinulta salatut.
verses.king_james: O God, thou knowest my foolishness; and my sins are not hid from thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non erubescant in me qui exspectant te, Domine, Domine virtutum ;  non confundantur super me qui quærunt te, Deus Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־יֵ֘בֹ֤שׁוּ בִ֨י ׀ קֹוֶיךָ֮ אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִ֗ה צְבָ֫א֥וֹת אַל־יִכָּ֣לְמֽוּ בִ֣י מְבַקְשֶׁ֑יךָ אֱ֝לֹהֵ֗י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let not them be ashamed for me, who look for thee, O Lord, the Lord of hosts. Let them not be confounded on my account, who seek thee, O God of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Älä salli heitä häpiään tulla minun tähteni, jotka sinua odottavat, Herra, Herra Zebaot: älä anna heitä häväistä minun tähteni, jotka sinua etsivät, Israelin Jumala.
verses.king_james: Let not them that wait on thee, O Lord God of hosts, be ashamed for my sake: let not those that seek thee be confounded for my sake, O God of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam propter te sustinui opprobrium ;  operuit confusio faciem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־עָ֭לֶיךָ נָשָׂ֣אתִי חֶרְפָּ֑ה כִּסְּתָ֖ה כְלִמָּ֣ה פָנָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because for thy sake I have borne reproach; shame hath covered my face.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun tähtes minä pilkkaa kärsin; minun kasvoni ovat täynnä häpiää.
verses.king_james: Because for thy sake I have borne reproach; shame hath covered my face.

verses.latin_vulgate: Extraneus factus sum fratribus meis,  et peregrinus filiis matris meæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מ֭וּזָר הָיִ֣יתִי לְאֶחָ֑י וְ֝נׇכְרִ֗י לִבְנֵ֥י אִמִּֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I am become a stranger to my brethren, and an alien to the sons of my mother.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen muukalaiseksi veljilleni tullut, ja oudoksi äitini lapsille.
verses.king_james: I am become a stranger unto my brethren, and an alien unto my mother’s children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam zelus domus tuæ comedit me,  et opprobria exprobrantium tibi ceciderunt super me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־קִנְאַ֣ת בֵּיתְךָ֣ אֲכָלָ֑תְנִי וְחֶרְפּ֥וֹת ח֝וֹרְפֶ֗יךָ נָפְל֥וּ עָלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the zeal of thy house hath eaten me up: and the reproaches of them that reproached thee are fallen upon me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä sinun huonees kiivaus syö minua: ja heidän pilkkansa, jotka sinua pilkkasivat, lankesi minun päälleni.
verses.king_james: For the zeal of thine house hath eaten me up; and the reproaches of them that reproached thee are fallen upon me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et operui in jejunio animam meam,  et factum est in opprobrium mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶבְכֶּ֣ה בַצּ֣וֹם נַפְשִׁ֑י וַתְּהִ֖י לַחֲרָפ֣וֹת לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I covered my soul in fasting: and it was made a reproach to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä itkin ja paastosin hartaasti, ja minä pilkattiin päälliseksi.
verses.king_james: When I wept, and chastened my soul with fasting, that was to my reproach.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et posui vestimentum meum cilicium ;  et factus sum illis in parabolam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶתְּנָ֣ה לְבוּשִׁ֣י שָׂ֑ק וָאֱהִ֖י לָהֶ֣ם לְמָשָֽׁל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I made haircloth my garment: and I became a byword to them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä puin säkin ylleni, ja olin heille sananlaskuksi.
verses.king_james: I made sackcloth also my garment; and I became a proverb to them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adversum me loquebantur qui sedebant in porta,  et in me psallebant qui bibebant vinum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָשִׂ֣יחוּ בִ֭י יֹ֣שְׁבֵי שָׁ֑עַר וּ֝נְגִינ֗וֹת שׁוֹתֵ֥י שֵׁכָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: They that sat in the gate spoke against me: and they that drank wine made me their song.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jotka portissa istuvat, ne minusta jaarittelevat, ja juodessansa he minusta lauleskelevat.
verses.king_james: They that sit in the gate speak against me; and I was the song of the drunkards.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego vero orationem meam ad te, Domine ;  tempus beneplaciti, Deus.  In multitudine misericordiæ tuæ,  exaudi me in veritate salutis tuæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנִ֤י תְפִלָּֽתִי־לְךָ֨ ׀ יְהֹוָ֡ה עֵ֤ת רָצ֗וֹן אֱלֹהִ֥ים בְּרׇב־חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ עֲ֝נֵ֗נִי בֶּאֱמֶ֥ת יִשְׁעֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: But as for me, my prayer is to thee, O Lord; for the time of thy good pleasure, O God. In the multitude of thy mercy hear me, in the truth of thy salvation.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä rukoilen sinua, Herra, otollisella ajalla, Jumala, sinun suuren laupiutes puolesta: kuule minua sinun autuutes totuuden tähden.
verses.king_james: But as for me, my prayer is unto thee, O Lord, in an acceptable time: O God, in the multitude of thy mercy hear me, in the truth of thy salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Eripe me de luto, ut non infigar ;  libera me ab iis qui oderunt me, et de profundis aquarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַצִּילֵ֣נִי מִ֭טִּיט וְאַל־אֶטְבָּ֑עָה אִנָּצְלָ֥ה מִ֝שֹּׂנְאַ֗י וּמִמַּ֖עֲמַקֵּי־מָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Draw me out of the mire, that I may not stick fast: deliver me from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pelasta minua loasta, etten minä vajoaisi; että minä pelastettaisiin vihollisistani ja syvistä vesistä.
verses.king_james: Deliver me out of the mire, and let me not sink: let me be delivered from them that hate me, and out of the deep waters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non me demergat tempestas aquæ,  neque absorbeat me profundum,  neque urgeat super me puteus os suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּשְׁטְפֵ֤נִי ׀ שִׁבֹּ֣לֶת מַ֭יִם וְאַל־תִּבְלָעֵ֣נִי מְצוּלָ֑ה וְאַל־תֶּאְטַר־עָלַ֖י בְּאֵ֣ר פִּֽיהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let not the tempest of water drown me, nor the deep water swallow me up: and let not the pit shut her mouth upon me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettei vuo minua upottaisi ja syvyydet minua lainoaisi, eikä kaivon suu suljettaisi minun päälleni.
verses.king_james: Let not the waterflood overflow me, neither let the deep swallow me up, and let not the pit shut her mouth upon me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Exaudi me, Domine, quoniam benigna est misericordia tua ;  secundum multitudinem miserationum tuarum respice in me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲנֵ֣נִי יְ֭הֹוָה כִּי־ט֣וֹב חַסְדֶּ֑ךָ כְּרֹ֥ב רַ֝חֲמֶ֗יךָ פְּנֵ֣ה אֵלָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hear me, O Lord, for thy mercy is kind; look upon me according to the multitude of thy tender mercies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuule minua, Herra; sillä sinun laupiutes on hyvä: käännä sinuas minun puoleeni, sinun suuren laupiutes tähden.
verses.king_james: Hear me, O Lord; for thy lovingkindness is good: turn unto me according to the multitude of thy tender mercies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ne avertas faciem tuam a puero tuo ;  quoniam tribulor, velociter exaudi me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַל־תַּסְתֵּ֣ר פָּ֭נֶיךָ מֵעַבְדֶּ֑ךָ כִּי־צַר־לִ֝֗י מַהֵ֥ר עֲנֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And turn not away thy face from thy servant: for I am in trouble, hear me speedily.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja älä peitä kasvojas palvelialtas; sillä minä ahdistetaan: kuultele minua nopiasti.
verses.king_james: And hide not thy face from thy servant; for I am in trouble: hear me speedily.

verses.latin_vulgate: Intende animæ meæ, et libera eam ;  propter inimicos meos, eripe me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קׇרְבָ֣ה אֶל־נַפְשִׁ֣י גְאָלָ֑הּ לְמַ֖עַן אֹיְבַ֣י פְּדֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Attend to my soul, and deliver it: save me because of my enemies.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lähene minun sieluani, ja lunasta häntä: minun vihollisteni tähden pelasta minua.
verses.king_james: Draw nigh unto my soul, and redeem it: deliver me because of mine enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu scis improperium meum, et confusionem meam, et reverentiam meam ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַתָּ֤ה יָדַ֗עְתָּ חֶרְפָּתִ֣י וּ֭בׇשְׁתִּי וּכְלִמָּתִ֑י נֶ֝גְדְּךָ֗ כׇּל־צוֹרְרָֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Thou knowest my reproach, and my confusion, and my shame.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sinäpä tiedät pilkkani, häpiäni ja häväistykseni: kaikki minun viholliseni ovat edessäs.
verses.king_james: Thou hast known my reproach, and my shame, and my dishonour: mine adversaries are all before thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: in conspectu tuo sunt omnes qui tribulant me.  Improperium exspectavit cor meum et miseriam :  et sustinui qui simul contristaretur, et non fuit ;  et qui consolaretur, et non inveni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶרְפָּ֤ה ׀ שָׁ֥בְרָ֥ה לִבִּ֗י וָאָ֫נ֥וּשָׁה וָאֲקַוֶּ֣ה לָנ֣וּד וָאַ֑יִן וְ֝לַמְנַחֲמִ֗ים וְלֹ֣א מָצָֽאתִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: In thy sight are all they that afflict me; my heart hath expected reproach and misery. And I looked for one that would grieve together with me, but there was none: and for one that would comfort me, and I found none.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pilkka särkee minun sydämeni ja vaivaa minua: minä odotan, jos joku armahtais, ja ei ole kenkään, ja lohduttajia, vaan en ketään löydä.
verses.king_james: Reproach hath broken my heart; and I am full of heaviness: and I looked for some to take pity, but there was none; and for comforters, but I found none.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dederunt in escam meam fel,  et in siti mea potaverunt me aceto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְּנ֣וּ בְּבָרוּתִ֣י רֹ֑אשׁ וְ֝לִצְמָאִ֗י יַשְׁק֥וּנִי חֹֽמֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they gave me gall for my food, and in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he antoivat minulle sappea syödäkseni, ja etikkaa juodakseni minun janossani.
verses.king_james: They gave me also gall for my meat; and in my thirst they gave me vinegar to drink.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat mensa eorum coram ipsis in laqueum,  et in retributiones, et in scandalum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהִי־שֻׁלְחָנָ֣ם לִפְנֵיהֶ֣ם לְפָ֑ח וְלִשְׁלוֹמִ֥ים לְמוֹקֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let their table become as a snare before them, and a recompense, and a stumblingblock.
verses.finnish_biblia: Heidän pöytänsä olkoon heille paulaksi, sekä kostoksi että lankeemiseksi.
verses.king_james: Let their table become a snare before them: and that which should have been for their welfare, let it become a trap.

verses.latin_vulgate: Obscurentur oculi eorum, ne videant,  et dorsum eorum semper incurva.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תֶּחְשַׁ֣כְנָה עֵ֭ינֵיהֶם מֵרְא֑וֹת וּ֝מׇתְנֵיהֶ֗ם תָּמִ֥יד הַמְעַֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let their eyes be darkened that they see not; and their back bend thou down always.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkoon heidän silmänsä pimiäksi, ettei he näkisi, ja salli heidän lanteensa aina horjua.
verses.king_james: Let their eyes be darkened, that they see not; and make their loins continually to shake.

verses.latin_vulgate: Effunde super eos iram tuam,  et furor iræ tuæ comprehendat eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁפׇךְ־עֲלֵיהֶ֥ם זַעְמֶ֑ךָ וַחֲר֥וֹן אַ֝פְּךָ֗ יַשִּׂיגֵֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Pour out thy indignation upon them: and let thy wrathful anger take hold of them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vuodata närkästykses heidän päällensä, ja hirmuinen vihas käsittäköön heitä,
verses.king_james: Pour out thine indignation upon them, and let thy wrathful anger take hold of them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiat habitatio eorum deserta,  et in tabernaculis eorum non sit qui inhabitet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּהִי־טִירָתָ֥ם נְשַׁמָּ֑ה בְּ֝אׇהֳלֵיהֶ֗ם אַל־יְהִ֥י יֹשֵֽׁב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let their habitation be made desolate: and let there be none to dwell in their tabernacles.
verses.finnish_biblia: Olkoon heidän huoneensa kylmillä; ja ei kenkään olko, joka heidän majassansa asuis.
verses.king_james: Let their habitation be desolate; and let none dwell in their tents.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam quem tu percussisti persecuti sunt,  et super dolorem vulnerum meorum addiderunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־אַתָּ֣ה אֲשֶׁר־הִכִּ֣יתָ רָדָ֑פוּ וְאֶל־מַכְא֖וֹב חֲלָלֶ֣יךָ יְסַפֵּֽרוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because they have persecuted him whom thou hast smitten; and they have added to the grief of my wounds.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä he vainoovat sitä, jota lyönyt olet, ja juttelevat niiden kipua, joita haavoittanut olet.
verses.king_james: For they persecute him whom thou hast smitten; and they talk to the grief of those whom thou hast wounded.

verses.latin_vulgate: Appone iniquitatem super iniquitatem eorum,  et non intrent in justitiam tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תְּֽנָה־עָ֭וֺן עַל־עֲוֺנָ֑ם וְאַל־יָ֝בֹ֗אוּ בְּצִדְקָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Add thou iniquity upon their iniquity: and let them not come into thy justice.
verses.finnish_biblia: Salli heitä langeta synnistä syntiin, ettei he tulisi sinun vanhurskautees.
verses.king_james: Add iniquity unto their iniquity: and let them not come into thy righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deleantur de libro viventium,  et cum justis non scribantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭מָּחֽוּ מִסֵּ֣פֶר חַיִּ֑ים וְעִ֥ם צַ֝דִּיקִ֗ים אַל־יִכָּתֵֽבוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let them be blotted out of the book of the living; and with the just let them not be written.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pyyhi heitä eläväin kirjasta, ettei he kirjoitettaisi vanhurskasten kanssa.
verses.king_james: Let them be blotted out of the book of the living, and not be written with the righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego sum pauper et dolens ;  salus tua, Deus, suscepit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֭אֲנִי עָנִ֣י וְכוֹאֵ֑ב יְשׁוּעָתְךָ֖ אֱלֹהִ֣ים תְּשַׂגְּבֵֽנִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But I am poor and sorrowful: thy salvation, O God, hath set me up.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta minä olen raadollinen ja murheellinen: Jumala, sinun autuutes suojelkoon minua!
verses.king_james: But I am poor and sorrowful: let thy salvation, O God, set me up on high.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudabo nomen Dei cum cantico,  et magnificabo eum in laude :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲהַלְלָ֣ה שֵׁם־אֱלֹהִ֣ים בְּשִׁ֑יר וַאֲגַדְּלֶ֥נּוּ בְתוֹדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: I will praise the name of God with a canticle: and I will magnify him with praise.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä kiitän Jumalan nimeä veisuulla, ja suuresti ylistän häntä kiitoksella.
verses.king_james: I will praise the name of God with a song, and will magnify him with thanksgiving.

verses.latin_vulgate: et placebit Deo super vitulum novellum,  cornua producentem et ungulas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְתִיטַ֣ב לַ֭יהֹוָה מִשּׁ֥וֹר פָּ֗ר מַקְרִ֥ן מַפְרִֽיס׃
verses.douay_rheims: And it shall please God better than a young calf, that bringeth forth horns and hoofs.
verses.finnish_biblia: Se kelpaa paremmin Herralle kuin härkä taikka mulli, jolla ovat sarvet ja sorkat.
verses.king_james: This also shall please the Lord better than an ox or bullock that hath horns and hoofs.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videant pauperes, et lætentur ;  quærite Deum, et vivet anima vestra :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רָא֣וּ עֲנָוִ֣ים יִשְׂמָ֑חוּ דֹּרְשֵׁ֥י אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים וִיחִ֥י לְבַבְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let the poor see and rejoice: seek ye God, and your soul shall live.
verses.finnish_biblia: Raadolliset näkevät sen ja iloitsevat, ja jotka Jumalaa etsivät, heidän sydämensä pitää elämän.
verses.king_james: The humble shall see this, and be glad: and your heart shall live that seek God.

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam exaudivit pauperes Dominus,  et vinctos suos non despexit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־שֹׁמֵ֣עַ אֶל־אֶבְיוֹנִ֣ים יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאֶת־אֲ֝סִירָ֗יו לֹ֣א בָזָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the Lord hath heard the poor: and hath not despised his prisoners.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Herra kuulee köyhiä, ja ei hän vankiansa katso ylön.
verses.king_james: For the Lord heareth the poor, and despiseth not his prisoners.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudent illum cæli et terra ;  mare, et omnia reptilia in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽ֭הַלְלוּהוּ שָׁמַ֣יִם וָאָ֑רֶץ יַ֝מִּ֗ים וְֽכׇל־רֹמֵ֥שׂ בָּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let the heavens and the earth praise him; the sea, and every thing that creepeth therein.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkään häntä taivaat ja maa, meri, ja kaikki kuin niissä liikkuvat.
verses.king_james: Let the heaven and earth praise him, the seas, and every thing that moveth therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam Deus salvam faciet Sion,  et ædificabuntur civitates Juda,  et inhabitabunt ibi, et hæreditate acquirent eam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י אֱלֹהִ֨ים ׀ י֘וֹשִׁ֤יעַ צִיּ֗וֹן וְ֭יִבְנֶה עָרֵ֣י יְהוּדָ֑ה וְיָ֥שְׁבוּ שָׁ֝֗ם וִירֵשֽׁוּהָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: For God will save Sion, and the cities of Juda shall be built up. And they shall dwell there, and acquire it by inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Jumala auttaa Zionia ja rakentaa Juudan kaupungit, että siellä asutaan, ja se perinnöllä omistetaan.
verses.king_james: For God will save Zion, and will build the cities of Judah: that they may dwell there, and have it in possession.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et semen servorum ejus possidebit eam ;  et qui diligunt nomen ejus habitabunt in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֶ֣רַע עֲ֭בָדָיו יִנְחָל֑וּהָ וְאֹהֲבֵ֥י שְׁ֝מ֗וֹ יִשְׁכְּנוּ־בָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the seed of his servants shall possess it; and they that love his name shall dwell therein.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen palveliainsa siemen sen perii: ja ne, jotka hänen nimeänsä rakastavat, pitää asuman siinä.
verses.king_james: The seed also of his servants shall inherit it: and they that love his name shall dwell therein.
